CP00-606 is a clean descriptor-only Risk-A pack covering the 10 planned `RP19.P08.M06.S08–S17` "Synthetic Fixture Set" units. Every layer (registry binding, requirements, service builders, validators, contract projection, validator script, README anchor, and three substantive tests) agrees with the manifest and plan binding. The pack correctly does **not** claim `production_ready`/`runtime_ready`; the `production_ready_flag` is a descriptor-verification marker only. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold at source level (no fs/network/process imports), Claude stays read-only and non-approving, and Hermes patterns are confined to descriptor review packet/receipt handling. Review-hardening preflight is valid (no auth-failure/0-byte/malformed evidence).

Only one **P3 (by-design)**: the post-review artifacts (`claude-review-result.json`, `adjudication.md`, `construction-inspection.json`) aren't present yet — expected per the documented `hardening_sequence`, to be produced and validated by `npm run closeout-pack:validate` before commit. No P0/P1 issues.
